name: BMCE Bank of Africa
description: Universal bank, Morocco’s third private‑sector bank with significant market share in loans and deposits. Operates in 21 African countries and has a pan‑African presence.

##
#21RESOURCESFORTHEFUTURE
Africa is a promise for the 21st century, in which BANK OF AFRICA unequivocally believes. We see the African continent as a dynamic one, confident in its potential, and fully anchored in its time.
We share this conviction with the world today, with the ambition to reveal the potential of Africa and Africans.
[Read more](https://www.bankofafrica.ma/groupe/21ressourcespourlavenir)
[ ![play](https://www.bankofafrica.ma/themes/custom/boa/assets/images/play.png) ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GicFfRUVHr0)
